stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs.
substantive: She opposes increased funding for the NHS.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs. She opposes increased funding for the NHS. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I did not go into politics to win elections, but to make this country a better place.”
